partial_progress.details: Phase 0 (seriality axioms) completed. Phases 1-3 preserved from prior run. Phases 4-11 not started.

completion_data.completion_summary: Added seriality axioms (F(neg bot), P(neg bot)) to the proof system with full soundness proofs. Fixed 4 downstream references in CanonicalCompleteness.lean replacing T-axiom proofs with seriality-based proofs. Added Nontrivial D constraint to valid_dense and valid_discrete for correct frame conditions. Build passes with zero sorries and zero new axioms.
